description_long: This bungalow features a steeply pitched, blue-tiled gable roof with wide overhangs and exposed wooden beams, giving it a rustic yet sturdy appearance. The front facade includes a small covered porch supported by wooden posts, with a stone pathway leading up to the entrance. A prominent stone chimney rises from the left side of the roof, suggesting a fireplace inside. The exterior walls are a mix of wood paneling and stone, with a raised wooden deck extending from one side, partially sheltered by the roof. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with larger openings on the side and smaller ones near the front. The structure sits on a grassy plot, elevated slightly above ground level by short supports.
description: A rustic bungalow with a steep blue-tiled gable roof, exposed wooden beams, a stone chimney, and a small covered porch. The exterior combines wood and stone, with a raised deck and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with a small covered porch, stone steps, and the prominent gable roof with exposed beams.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the stone chimney, the blue-tiled roof, and the raised wooden deck with a small object on it.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the extended deck, stone supports, and a clearer view of the asymmetrical window arrangement along the side.
description_view_3: The right side view focuses on the wide expanse of the blue-tiled roof and the chimney, with minimal visible openings or features.
